title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies family as a Curriculum Developer in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies:
Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies!
